case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ZHENYE LIANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFFS ARBITRATION BRIEF (TRANSACTION ID # 100027888) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-21-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-30-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE NOV-14-2017 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-10-2017. THE MAR-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR CHARLES OWEN GEERHART APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-10-2017 THROUGH JUL-09-2017.
NOTICE OF INTENT TO INTRODUCE EVIDENCE AT ARBITRATION PER CRC 3.823 (TRANSACTION ID # 100027891) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030326) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025335), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED DEC-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 60148440) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60148440) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 60148440) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 61020465) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIANG, ZHENYE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61373416)EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS
